title: Backend Engineer
description: Requires 3+ years of experience developing RESTful APIs, optimizing database queries, and maintaining scalable backend systems in cloud environments.
education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field

title: Data Scientist
description: Requires 4-6 years of experience in building machine learning models, cleaning raw datasets, and applying statistical methods for business intelligence.
education: Master’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, or related field

title: Cloud Solutions Architect
description: Requires 7-10 years of experience in designing enterprise cloud systems, leading cloud migrations, and managing hybrid infrastructure solutions.
education: Bachelor’s in Computer Science or IT; AWS/Azure certifications preferred

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Requires 2-4 years of experience monitoring SIEM dashboards, responding to security incidents, and performing vulnerability assessments.
education: Bachelor’s degree in Cybersecurity, IT, or related field

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Requires 5+ years of experience in training deep learning models, fine-tuning NLP algorithms, and deploying ML pipelines into production.
education: Master’s degree in Computer Science, AI, or related field

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Requires 3-5 years of experience in frontend frameworks (React/Angular) and backend technologies (Node.js, Django), with proven project delivery.
education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related discipline

title: Financial Analyst
description: Requires 2-3 years of experience in preparing financial reports, analyzing budgets, and supporting senior executives with forecasting models.
education: Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, or Accounting

title: Investment Banker
description: Requires 5-8 years of experience structuring M&A deals, raising capital for clients, and negotiating large-scale financial transactions.
education: Bachelor’s or MBA in Finance, Business, or Economics

title: Chartered Accountant
description: Requires 4-6 years of experience handling audits, taxation, and compliance across multinational corporations.
education: CA Qualification or Bachelor’s in Accounting

title: Civil Engineer
description: Requires 3-5 years of experience designing urban infrastructure projects, conducting site inspections, and using CAD tools for structural planning.
education: Bachelor’s in Civil Engineering

title: Mechanical Engineer
description: Requires 4-6 years of experience in designing mechanical components, running simulations for stress/heat analysis, and supervising prototype manufacturing.
education: Bachelor’s in Mechanical Engineering

title: Electrical Engineer
description: Requires 3-5 years of experience designing circuit systems, troubleshooting electrical equipment, and managing large-scale power distribution projects.
education: Bachelor’s in Electrical Engineering

title: Architect
description: Requires 5-7 years of experience in designing commercial or residential buildings, managing client requirements, and producing 3D visualization models.
education: Bachelor’s in Architecture

title: Doctor (General Practitioner)
description: Requires 5+ years of clinical experience diagnosing and treating patients, managing prescriptions, and coordinating with specialists when necessary.
education: MBBS or equivalent medical degree

title: Surgeon
description: Requires 8-12 years of surgical experience performing complex operations, managing surgical teams, and ensuring post-operative care.
education: MD with specialization in Surgery

title: Pharmacist
description: Requires 3-5 years of experience dispensing prescriptions, counseling patients on medication use, and collaborating with physicians for treatment plans.
education: Doctor of Pharmacy (PharmD)

title: Dentist
description: Requires 4-6 years of professional practice diagnosing oral diseases, performing dental surgeries, and cosmetic dental procedures.
education: Doctor of Dental Surgery (DDS) or equivalent

title: Lawyer
description: Requires 3-7 years of experience representing clients in civil or corporate cases, drafting contracts, and performing legal research.
education: Bachelor of Law (LLB) or Juris Doctor (JD)

title: Judge
description: Requires 15+ years of legal practice experience to preside over cases, interpret laws, and deliver impartial judgments.
education: Law degree with years of judicial or legal practice

title: Pilot
description: Requires 5-8 years of flying experience with a minimum of 1,500 flight hours logged operating commercial aircraft.
education: Commercial Pilot License (CPL)

title: University Professor
description: Requires 6-10 years of teaching and research experience in academia, with published work in peer-reviewed journals.
education: PhD in relevant subject

title: Research Scientist
description: Requires 5-7 years of laboratory experience conducting experiments, publishing research papers, and collaborating on funded projects.
education: PhD in Science or Engineering

title: IT Project Manager
description: Requires 6-8 years of experience leading IT teams, implementing Agile methodologies, and delivering enterprise projects on schedule.
education: Bachelor’s in IT, CS, or Business Management

title: Cybersecurity Engineer
description: Requires 4-6 years of experience building secure systems, implementing encryption, and managing penetration testing projects.
education: Bachelor’s degree in Cybersecurity or IT

title: UX/UI Designer
description: Requires 3-5 years of experience designing digital products, creating wireframes, and conducting user research for web and mobile apps.
education: Bachelor’s in Design, HCI, or related field

title: Artificial Intelligence Engineer
description: Requires 5-7 years of experience in deep learning, reinforcement learning, and deploying AI systems for real-world applications.
education: Bachelor’s/Master’s in AI, Computer Science, or related field

title: Blockchain Developer
description: Requires 3-6 years of experience creating decentralized apps, writing smart contracts, and implementing blockchain protocols.
education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field

title: Entrepreneur
description: Requires 3-10 years of experience running startups, raising venture capital, and leading cross-functional business operations.
education: Varies; often business knowledge and experience

title: Marketing Manager
description: Requires 5-8 years of experience in developing marketing strategies, managing campaigns, and analyzing consumer behavior data.
education: Bachelor’s in Marketing, Business, or Communications

title: Product Manager
description: Requires 4-7 years of experience managing product lifecycles, collaborating with engineering teams, and driving go-to-market strategies.
education: Bachelor’s in Business, Engineering, or related field

title: HR Manager
description: Requires 6-9 years of experience in talent acquisition, employee relations, and implementing HR policies within large organizations.
education: Bachelor’s/Master’s in Human Resource Management or related field

title: Supply Chain Manager
description: Requires 5-8 years of experience in logistics management, inventory planning, and coordinating supplier relationships across regions.
education: Bachelor’s in Business, Logistics, or related field

title: Chief Technology Officer (CTO)
description: Requires 12+ years of experience leading technology teams, driving innovation, and defining company-wide tech strategies.
education: Bachelor’s/Master’s in Computer Science or related field
